title: Children and medication - Canada.ca
content:
## Children and medication
On medications for children, including acetaminophen, what to avoid and questions to ask your doctor.

## Services and information

### Safe use of medication for children
Proper use, risks and side effects of prescription medication.

### Concerns about children's medication
Medication ingredients that are unsafe for children under 6 years old.

### Ask your doctor about your child's medication
Proper handling, dispensing and storage of medications for your child.

### Acetaminophen and children
Tips on how children can safely be given acetaminophen.
